title: daemon/store: get_space_members_batch LIMIT 100000 not a real bound
description: get_space_members_batch (store.rs line 765) IN query uses LIMIT 100000, which is 100x the per-space cap of 1000 used elsewhere. A JMAP SpaceMember/get with many space IDs can trigger up to 100,000 row fetch (~50-100 MB heap) per request. Trigger: JMAP request with large space_ids list. Bad behavior: uncapped RAM per request; pool connection held for duration of fetch.
